---
name: Initiative
about: Top-level tracker for one milestone-sized effort
title: "Epic: "
labels: ""
assignees: ""
---

## Canonical Spec

- [ ] Link the primary design doc in `docs/`

## Milestone

- [ ] Set the GitHub milestone

## Goal

Short paragraph. What changes when this initiative is complete?

## Scope

- [ ] Define the initiative boundary
- [ ] Note what is explicitly out of scope

## Slice Issues

- [ ] Link child issues here

## Current Focus

- Human:
- codex-1:
- codex-2:
- claude-1:
- claude-2:

## Acceptance

- [ ] List the initiative-level completion conditions

## Handoffs

Use short factual comments in this format:

```md
## <AgentName>
- Changed:
- Tests:
- Open:
- State:
- Next:
```
